_meta.description: Topic queue for The Forge auto-generation. See BACKFILL.md for spec. The seeded entries below show the format; the rest are generated by the BACKFILL Claude Code session.

topics.title: What is the Model Context Protocol, actually?
topics.description: Plain-English explainer of MCP for builders who keep hearing the acronym and want to know what's underneath. The actual transport, the tool-call shape, what changes for them.

topics.title: An agent can read your weekly Slack catch-up. Here's how.
topics.description: Slack web API + Claude API + a daily cron. The exact prompt that summarises 50 channels into 5 bullet points without missing the things that matter.

topics.title: filesystem-mcp: the most useful MCP server you're not using
topics.description: Read, write, search files in your project from inside Claude Desktop. Set up in 90 seconds. The compounding effect on a coding workflow.

topics.title: Cursor vs Cline vs Claude Desktop: which to use when
topics.description: Three MCP-capable agents, three different sweet spots. The criteria that actually matter when you're picking. Plus, when none of them fits.

topics.title: Stop building agents. Build composable tools instead.
topics.description: Why "agent" is the wrong abstraction for most automation work. The case for thinking in tools and prompts, with the boundaries between them clean.
